narrative: Fire-regime work this cycle spans intraspecific serotiny variation in a fire-prone Chinese pine, reproductive-maturity thresholds governing an endangered obligate seeder's persistence under future fire, and a pan-boreal forest-age map tying disturbance history to carbon and biodiversity outcomes. Climate signals are strong: warmer conditions are projected to raise background tree mortality across eastern North America and are already suppressing conifer recruitment in the Rocky Mountains even among heat-adapted populations, while a long-term jaguar study in Amazonian floodplains flags a worrying demographic shift toward male-biased populations. Landscape and conservation studies converge on data and evidence gaps: hotspots of faunal data deficiency, a systematic review showing floodplain restoration gains are often eroded by post-restoration invasions, and three decades of IUCN Red List reassessment charting shark and ray extinction risk. On the methods side, ecologists are extending density-surface estimation by fusing passive acoustic and point-count data streams, and a new R package (ForestForTrees) lowers the barrier to inferring forest structure from remote sensing. Evolutionary biology contributes a synthesis on what climate adaptation practice can borrow from evolutionary theory, alongside new phylogenomic evidence for the deep, non-linear origins of multicellularity in streptophytes. Biogeographic work traces climatic niche shifts of invasive plants in India and latitudinal patterns in upper tree limits across Europe, rounding out a cycle heavy on demography, restoration evidence, and next-generation monitoring tools.

methods_radar.title: A New Framework to Empower Ecosystem Assessment Through the Integration of eDNA Inventories, Graph Theory and Niche Modelling
methods_radar.note: New integrative framework combining eDNA, graph theory and niche modelling for ecosystem assessment.

methods_radar.title: Modelling density surfaces from integrated passive acoustic and point count data streams
methods_radar.note: Novel model integrating passive acoustic monitoring with point-count data for absolute density estimation.

methods_radar.title: ForestForTrees: An R package to infer forest structure from remote sensing data
methods_radar.note: New R package (ForestForTrees) automating Bayesian correction of occluded forest size distributions.

methods_radar.title: sampley: A Python package for sampling visual survey data
methods_radar.note: New Python package (sampley) standardises spatiotemporal sampling of visual survey data.

methods_radar.title: From video to behaviour: An LSTM‐based approach for automated nest behaviour recognition in the wild
methods_radar.note: New LSTM-based deep learning framework for automated nest behaviour recognition in the wild.

methods_radar.title: Mothbox and Mothbot: Automated light trap and data processing system for scalable insect monitoring
methods_radar.note: New open-source hardware/software system (Mothbox/Mothbot) for automated insect light-trap monitoring.

methods_radar.title: In situ aerial bioacoustic monitoring from extremely noisy drone recordings
methods_radar.note: New drone-based acoustic sensing system filters rotor noise for aerial bioacoustic monitoring.

methods_radar.title: Cell‐based crop phenotyping for future climates
methods_radar.note: Proposes a robotics- and ML-based pipeline for high-throughput cell-based crop phenotyping.

methods_radar.title: Comparative species distribution model framework for marine conservation and its application to loggerhead turtles in the Mediterranean
methods_radar.note: Benchmarking workflow compares species distribution model performance for marine conservation planning.

methods_radar.title: Estimation of Forest Soil Organic Carbon Density in Dry Tropical Valleys Based on Multi-source Data and Machine Learning Algorithm
methods_radar.note: Machine learning applied to multi-source data for forest soil organic carbon density estimation.

methods_radar.title: Multiscale species distribution models reveal seascape niche partitioning and overlap in native and alien fishes
methods_radar.note: Multiscale species distribution modelling framework applied to seascape niche partitioning.

methods_radar.title: A multi-satellite comparison of forest growth between karst and adjacent non-karst nature reserves
methods_radar.note: Multi-satellite remote sensing comparison method for forest growth in karst vs non-karst reserves.

methods_radar.title: BIMr2: Inference of migration rates and their drivers from multilocus genotypes
methods_radar.note: BIMr2 improves estimation robustness of the existing BIMr migration-rate inference method.

methods_radar.title: Changing patterns of colonisation and persistence during the wolf recolonisation of the human‐dominated Italian alpine region
methods_radar.note: Dynamic occupancy models applied to multi-year wolf recolonisation data in the Italian Alps.

methods_radar.title: Species traits mediate the abundant‐center patterns in ground‐dwelling mammal and bird species in China
methods_radar.note: Trait-mediated analysis applied to test the abundant-center hypothesis using camera-trap data.

methods_radar.title: Ground‐to‐canopy monitoring reveals hidden ecological patterns in Congo Basin mammals
methods_radar.note: Camera traps deployed across vertical forest strata to monitor Congo Basin mammal communities.

methods_radar.title: Spectrally Guided Delineation of Structurally Homogeneous Vegetation Patches Using Sentinel-2 Imagery in Heterogeneous Post-Industrial Landscapes
methods_radar.note: Sentinel-2 imagery used for spectrally guided delineation of vegetation patches.

methods_radar.title: eDNA sampling reveals no evidence of negative effects of beaver recolonisation on the catchment‐scale distribution of migratory fish
methods_radar.note: eDNA sampling applied to assess beaver-fish catchment-scale co-distribution.

methods_radar.title: Effects of urban vegetation on the surface urban heat island: a UAV approach with a focus on private gardens
methods_radar.note: UAV thermal imaging applied to assess urban heat island effects of private garden vegetation.

methods_radar.title: Addressing false negatives and positives in eDNA studies
methods_radar.note: Examines and reports false positive/negative detection error rates across eDNA studies.

methods_radar.title: Resolving Emergent Patterns in Community Genetics With Environmental DNA
methods_radar.note: Environmental DNA applied to resolve community genetics patterns across space and time.

methods_radar.title: Linking regional and global functional trait data: insights from mammal communities in a fragmented Atlantic Forest landscape
methods_radar.note: Evaluates the global EltonTraits database against local camera-trap and sand-plot field data.
